channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Zero Trust Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2024
item.description: Explore the evolution of zero trust in government The post Federal Executive Forum Zero Trust Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2024 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Judge tosses Huckabee lawsuit against Meta over ads suggesting he endorsed marijuana gummies
item.description: WILMINGTON, Del. (AP) — A federal judge in Delaware on Monday dismissed a lawsuit filed by former Arkansas Gov. Mike Huckabee against social media giant Meta over advertisements using his name and image to sell CBD products.
item.dc:creator: RANDALL CHASE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Banks bet on AI to deliver digital efficiencies
item.description: In the face of shrinking budgets and rising customer expectations, banks are increasingly relying on AI, according to a recent study by consulting firm Publicis Sapiens.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Importance of Technology in Achieving Sustainable Goals: Insights from a Recent Study
item.description: A recent study highlights the crucial role technology plays in achieving sustainable goals, and key principles for improvement.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Convergence of 5G-Advanced Networks and Artificial Intelligence Redefines Digital Landscape
item.description: Technological evolution, 5.5G networks, artificial intelligence, mobile AI era, digital transformation, economic growth
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Library of Congress says an adversary hacked some emails
item.description: The library said that an adversary accessed email communications during the period from January to September.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Onion CEO explains Infowars purchase amid Alex Jones's claims about auction
item.description: The Onion CEO Ben Collins confirmed that the publication purchased Alex Jones’s Infowars outlet in a Saturday series of posts on the social media platform Bluesky amid Jones's claims of wrongdoing and illegal activity.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Trump’s new DOGE task force is tailor-made to benefit Elon Musk’s businesses
item.description: On Tuesday, President-elect Donald Trump named Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy as cochairs of a new Department of Government Efficiency, or DOGE.
item.dc:creator: Jay Willis, Fast Company

item.title: Lawsuit Against Elon Musk Over Dogecoin Ends in Dismissal
item.description: Elon Musk's lawsuit over alleged fraud and insider trading with Dogecoin comes to a close as investors withdraw their appeal.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: A challenge to recreate how the International Space Station was built
item.description: A new challenge looks to digitally recreate the planning of each module of the International Space Station. The post A challenge to recreate how the International Space Station was built first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft’s Patch Tuesday updates: Keeping up with the latest fixes
item.description: Long before Taco Tuesday became part of the pop-culture vernacular, Tuesdays were synonymous with security — and for anyone in the tech world, they still are.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.5 gains security, networking upgrades
item.description: Red Hat is out this week with the latest milestone update of its flagship Linux platform. Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.5 (RHEL) became generally available on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google’s Gemini app is now available on iPhones
item.description: Google has entered a new and more intense phase of the AI wars, introducing its own Google Gemini app for iPhones; now you can use Apple Intelligence, ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot and Google Gemini on one device.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Versa unveils VersaONE converged security, networking platform
item.description: Versa Networks is offering a platform that brings together its SASE, SSE, SD-WAN and SD-LAN components under one umbrella. Called VersaONE, the converged platform is aimed at reducing risk and lowering infrastructure complexity and costs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Rise of ClickFix Scams: Protecting Yourself from Malware Infections
item.description: Cybersecurity expert warns about the increasing threat of ClickFix scams, which target users with fake error messages and malware infections.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In Cyprus, Ukrainians learn how to dispose of landmines that kill and maim hundreds
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — In a Cypriot National Guard camp, Ukrainians are being trained on how to identify, locate and dispose of landmines and other unexploded munitions that litter huge swaths of their country, killing and maiming hundreds of people, including children.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Now you can download an ISO file of Windows 11 for Arm chips
item.description: It’s been possible for users to download ISO files of the Windows operating system, but until now that option has only applied to the x86 version. Now it’s finally possible to download an ISO file of Windows 11 for computers with Arm-based chips from Microsoft’s website, according to Neowin.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: One Tech Tip: Replacing passwords with passkeys for an easier login experience
item.description: LONDON (AP) — If you're tired of memorizing passwords, then give passkeys a try. You might have noticed that many online services are now offering the option of using passkeys, a digital authentication method touted as an easier and more secure way to log in.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Understanding Hyperlight, Microsoft’s minimal VM manager
item.description: Virtualization seemed to be one of those technologies that was done. With Hyper-V, VMware, and KVM all offering similar features and performance, all that was left to do was to support new chipset instructions and fix bugs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Observe, New Relic boost observability of Kubernetes workloads
item.description: Observability providers Observe and New Relic this week separately introduced Kubernetes-specific capabilities in their platforms that will enable faster problem resolution across complex container environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: CISA’s SILENTSHIELD assessment requires urgent measures
item.description: The SILENTSHIELD red team assessment has highlighted the urgent need for enhanced cyber resilience within federal agencies. The post CISA’s SILENTSHIELD assessment requires urgent measures first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: AI Developments: A New Era Dawns Under Incoming Trump Admin
item.description: Explore the impact of AI advancements, 'Donald Trump neuron' discovery, and Elon Musk's potential appointment as AI advisor on the economy and global tech landscape.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bitcoin neared $90,000 in a new record high. What to know about crypto's post-election rally
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As money continues to pour into crypto following Donald Trump's reelection last week, bitcoin has climbed to yet another record high. The world's largest cryptocurrency topped $89,000 for the first time, briefly peaking at $89,995 early Tuesday, according to CoinDesk.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Prada's out-of-this-world spacesuit for NASA
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses how Axiom Space and luxury designer Prada are collaborating on NASA's Artemis III spacesuit design.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Japan's SoftBank returns to profit after gains at Vision Fund and other investments
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology group SoftBank swung back to profitability in the July-September quarter, boosted by positive results in its Vision Fund investments. Tokyo-based SoftBank Group Corp.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, PIX 11
